name: Spiced Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté vegetables, add lentils and spices, simmer until soft.

name: Lemon Herb Salmon
instructions: Season salmon, bake with lemon and dill.

name: Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook quinoa, chop veggies, toss with feta.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
instructions: Sauté chicken and broccoli, stir in ginger and sauce.

name: Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Cook rice with broth slowly, stir in mushrooms and cheese.

name: Beet Hummus
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Spinach Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs, cook with spinach and cheese.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Cook beef, assemble in shells.

name: Sweet Potato Fries
instructions: Cut potatoes, toss with oil, bake until crispy.

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop and combine ingredients.

name: Veggie Curry
instructions: Simmer veggies with coconut milk and curry.

name: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread, mash avocado, sprinkle pepper.

name: Chia Pudding
instructions: Mix ingredients and let set overnight.

name: Garlic Shrimp
instructions: Sauté shrimp with garlic and butter.

name: Banana Smoothie
instructions: Blend all until smooth.

name: Caesar Salad
instructions: Toss lettuce with dressing and toppings.

name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Simmer ingredients and blend.

name: Pasta Carbonara
instructions: Cook pasta, mix with eggs and bacon.

name: Grilled Cheese
instructions: Butter bread, grill with cheese.
